answer:
相关符号：

- **`Memory::free_static`** — 释放静态分配的内存 (`os/memory.cpp`)
- **`Memory::free_aligned_static`** — 释放对齐分配的内存 (`os/memory.cpp`)
- **`DefaultAllocator::free`** — 默认分配器的释放方法 (`os/memory.h`)
- **`DefaultTypedAllocator::delete_allocation`** — 删除类型化分配 (`os/memory.h`)
- **`operator delete`** — 全局 delete 运算符重载 (`os/memory.h`)
